title: viola humilis
intro: Viola humilis, also known as the small yellow violet, is a flowering plant species in the viola genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola humilis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
